businessSummary.oneLiner: The undisputed king of AI computing — dominating global AI infrastructure with data center GPUs and accelerators
businessSummary.description: NVIDIA is the world's largest semiconductor design company, with AI training/inference data center accelerators as the core revenue driver. Q4 FY2026 revenue $68.13B (+73% YoY), EPS $1.62. Q1 FY2027 guidance $78B (±2%), beating consensus by $5.4B. Closed at $183.04 (+1.66%) on 3/4. GTC 2026 (3/16-19) D-12, Rubin R200 reveal expected. Invested $2B each in Lumentum and Coherent for photonics. Market cap $4.45T. P/E 37.36x, Forward P/E 22.19x, PEG 0.66.
howTheyMakeMoney: Data Center: AI training/inference GPUs (H100, H200, Blackwell B200/GB200/GB300) — ~91% of revenue
Gaming: GeForce RTX series GPUs and DLSS 4 technology
Automotive: DRIVE platform autonomous driving and vehicle AI chips
Software/Platform: CUDA ecosystem, NVIDIA AI Enterprise, Omniverse
keyProducts: Blackwell Ultra GB300: Latest AI accelerator, 50x throughput vs Hopper, 129% YoY shipment surge in 2026
Blackwell B200/GB200: Sold out across hyperscalers
H100/H200 Tensor Core GPUs: AI industry standard
Rubin R200: Next-gen GPU, official reveal at GTC 2026 (3/16-19)
DGX/HGX Systems: Turnkey servers for large-scale AI training

keyMetrics.name: P/E Ratio (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Reasonable for the AI semiconductor leader. Reflects hyper-growth

keyMetrics.name: PEG Ratio
keyMetrics.interpretation: Below 1.0 signals undervaluation relative to growth

keyMetrics.name: FCF
keyMetrics.interpretation: Massive free cash flow. Abundant capacity for buybacks and investments

growthDrivers.title: GTC 2026 (3/16-19) — Rubin R200 reveal D-12
growthDrivers.description: Jensen Huang to unveil next-gen Rubin (R200) architecture at San Jose GTC. 30,000 attendees expected. Event-driven re-rating potential.

growthDrivers.title: Lumentum & Coherent $2B each — photonics integration for AI processors
growthDrivers.description: NVIDIA investing $2B each in optical product manufacturers to integrate photonics technology into data center chips.

growthDrivers.title: Hyperscaler CapEx acceleration — CoreWeave 2026 CapEx $30B+
growthDrivers.description: CoreWeave doubling 2026 CapEx to $30B+. Combined Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, Microsoft ~$700B. Direct NVIDIA GPU demand.

growthDrivers.title: Q4 FY2026 13th consecutive earnings beat — Q1 guidance $78B
growthDrivers.description: Revenue $68.13B (+73% YoY), EPS $1.62. Q1 FY2027 guidance $78B (±2%) beating consensus by $5.4B.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: CUDA ecosystem (15M+ developers), annual architecture refreshes, dominant NVLink performance, 80%+ AI accelerator market share create a de facto monopoly.

moats.description: CUDA 15+ year history. 15M+ developers optimized for NVIDIA.
Hopper→Blackwell→Rubin annual architecture refresh. GB300 is 50x more efficient than Hopper.
Secured majority of TSMC's advanced CoWoS packaging capacity.
Multi-year partnerships with Meta, OpenAI, Eli Lilly, and more.

competitors.name: AMD
competitors.detail: MI300X/MI350 AI accelerators with 10-12% market share. MI450 (2nm) planned.

competitors.name: Intel
competitors.detail: Gaudi 3 launched but minimal market share.

competitors.name: Custom Silicon
competitors.detail: Google TPU, Amazon Trainium, Microsoft Maia — hyperscaler in-house chips accelerating.

competitors.name: Huawei Ascend
competitors.detail: NVIDIA alternative in China. Export controls limiting NVIDIA's China share.

recentNews.headline: GTC 2026 (3/16-19) officially announced — 30K attendees, AI industrial revolution showcase
recentNews.significance: Jensen Huang keynote with Rubin R200 reveal. Major catalyst

recentNews.headline: TipRanks: What to expect from GTC 2026 — Rubin, Physical AI, autonomous driving
recentNews.significance: Rubin R200 architecture and physical AI roadmap expected

recentNews.headline: Motley Fool: NVIDIA investors should mark March 16 on calendars
recentNews.significance: GTC could serve as NVDA stock's next major catalyst

recentNews.headline: GuruFocus: NVIDIA highlights AI's central role as infrastructure at GTC
recentNews.significance: Vision of AI as new industrial infrastructure

recentNews.headline: Q4 FY2026 earnings — revenue $68.13B, 13th consecutive beat
recentNews.significance: Record results but profit-taking amid 'Great Rotation'

analystOpinions.notableComment: Overwhelming Buy consensus from 37 analysts. Target $271.86 implies +48.5% upside. GTC is the re-rating catalyst.

risks.title: Great Rotation from mega-cap tech
risks.description: Broad market rotation from Mag-7 into defensives. Capital outflows from large tech.

risks.title: Export control escalation risk
risks.description: Expanded US-China AI chip export restrictions could limit portion of revenue.

risks.title: Customer concentration
risks.description: Revenue concentrated in top hyperscalers (MS, Meta, Google, Amazon). In-house chip transition risk.

risks.title: Valuation premium compression
risks.description: PEG 0.66 is attractive but $4.45T market cap is massive. Growth deceleration could compress multiples.

risks.title: Supply constraints
risks.description: Despite TSMC CoWoS capacity secured, demand continues to exceed supply.

buyReasons.title: GTC 2026 D-12 — near-term catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: Rubin R200 reveal and physical AI roadmap could drive stock re-rating.

buyReasons.title: PEG 0.66 — undervalued relative to growth
buyReasons.rationale: Forward P/E 22x with 73%+ growth rate. Most reasonable valuation among growth stocks.

buyReasons.title: Hyperscaler CapEx acceleration
buyReasons.rationale: 2026 combined hyperscaler CapEx $700B+. Structural increase in NVIDIA GPU demand.

buyReasons.title: Massive cash generation
buyReasons.rationale: FCF $96.9B, net cash $51.1B. Shareholder returns and strategic investments simultaneously.

overallOpinion: NVIDIA remains the undisputed leader in AI infrastructure, maintaining an attractive PEG of 0.66.
GTC 2026 (3/16-19) is just 12 days away. The Rubin R200 reveal could catalyze the next stock breakout.
Trading slightly below 50-day MA ($186) but stable above 200-day MA ($175). RSI 47 neutral — pre-GTC consolidation.
35 out of 37 analysts rate Buy. Target $271.86 implies +48.5% upside. Buy-on-dip thesis remains intact.
